FR-01.title: Project Creation and Setup
requirements: Create project with name, description, and team members
Set project start and end dates
acceptance_criteria: Project is created and visible in dashboard

FR-02.title: Task Management
requirements: Create tasks with title, description, assignee, and due date
Set task priority (low, medium, high, critical)
Organize tasks into columns (To Do, In Progress, Done)
acceptance_criteria: Task is created with all fields
Priority is visually indicated on card

FR-03.title: Sprint Planning
requirements: Create sprints with start/end dates and goals
Add tasks to sprints from backlog
acceptance_criteria: Sprint is created with correct dates
Tasks can be moved to sprint

FR-04.title: Team Collaboration
requirements: Real-time updates when team members make changes

FR-05.title: Time Tracking
requirements: Time reports per project and team member

FR-06.title: Gantt Chart View
requirements: Visual timeline of tasks and milestones
Task dependencies shown as connecting lines
acceptance_criteria: Tasks display on correct timeline positions
Critical path is highlighted in red

FR-07.title: Reporting Dashboard
requirements: Project status overview with completion percentage
acceptance_criteria: Workload shows task count per member

FR-08.title: Role-Based Access Control
requirements: Admins can manage all projects and settings
Managers can create and assign tasks
Members can view and update their assigned tasks
acceptance_criteria: Role permissions are enforced on all actions

FR-09.title: Integration with External Tools
requirements: Integrate with GitHub for commit linking
acceptance_criteria: GitHub commits link to relevant tasks
Slack messages arrive for configured events

FR-10.title: Template System
requirements: Pre-built templates for common project types
Templates include task structure and settings
acceptance_criteria: Template is saved with all project structure
New project from template includes all tasks
Template settings carry over to new project

FR-01.title: Build Project CRUD API
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/projects (name, description, methodology, start/end dates, members). GET /api/projects (user's projects). PATCH /api/projects/:id. Send invitation emails to members.

FR-01.title: Build Project Creation Wizard
FR-01.description: Create project setup wizard: Step 1 name/description, Step 2 methodology selection with preview, Step 3 date range picker, Step 4 invite team members by email. Document upload section.

FR-01.title: Create Project Database Schema
FR-01.description: Design projects collection: id, name, description, methodology, start_date, end_date, owner_id, members (array of user_ids with roles), status, created_at. Members subdocument with role field.

FR-02.title: Build Task CRUD API
FR-02.description: Create CRUD for tasks: POST /api/tasks (title, description, assignee, due_date, priority, status). PATCH /api/tasks/:id (update any field including status for drag-drop). Support bulk updates.

FR-02.title: Build Kanban Board
FR-02.description: Create board view with columns (To Do, In Progress, Done). Task cards showing title, assignee avatar, priority indicator, due date. Drag-and-drop between columns using drag API.

FR-02.title: Build Task Detail Modal
FR-02.description: Create task detail view with all fields editable inline: title, description (rich text), assignee dropdown, priority selector, due date picker, labels. Comments section and activity log.

FR-03.title: Build Sprint API
FR-03.description: Create POST /api/sprints (name, goal, start/end dates). POST /api/sprints/:id/tasks (add tasks). GET /api/sprints/:id/burndown (daily data). GET /api/sprints/:id/velocity.

FR-03.title: Build Sprint Planning UI
FR-03.description: Create sprint planning view with backlog panel (unassigned tasks) and sprint panel. Drag tasks between them. Sprint header with goal, dates, and point total. Burndown chart component.

FR-04.title: Build Comments and Activity API
FR-04.description: Create POST /api/tasks/:id/comments (text with @mentions). File upload for attachments. GET /api/tasks/:id/activity (chronological log). WebSocket for real-time updates.

FR-04.title: Build Collaboration UI
FR-04.description: Create task detail comments section with mention autocomplete, file attachment button, and activity timeline. Real-time WebSocket connection for live updates across team.

FR-05.title: Build Time Tracking API
FR-05.description: Create POST /api/time-entries (task_id, duration, date). POST /api/timer/start, /api/timer/stop for active tracking. GET /api/timesheets/weekly. GET /api/reports/time with project and user filters.

FR-05.title: Build Time Tracking UI
FR-05.description: Add timer button on task cards. Create timesheet page with weekly grid (rows: tasks, columns: days). Time entry modal for manual logging. Reports page with charts.

FR-06.title: Build Gantt Chart API
FR-06.description: Create GET /api/projects/:id/gantt returning tasks with start/end dates, dependencies, and milestones. PATCH /api/tasks/:id/dates for drag updates. Calculate critical path.

FR-06.title: Build Gantt Chart Component
FR-06.description: Create Gantt chart with horizontal task bars on timeline, dependency arrows between tasks, drag-to-resize for date changes, milestone diamonds, and critical path highlighting.

FR-07.title: Build Reports API
FR-07.description: Create GET /api/reports/status (completion stats), /api/reports/workload (per member), /api/reports/overdue (past due tasks), /api/reports/custom (filterable query builder).

FR-07.title: Build Reports Dashboard
FR-07.description: Create reporting page with project status donut chart, team workload bar chart, overdue tasks table, and custom report builder with date/member/status filters and export to CSV.

FR-08.title: Implement RBAC System
FR-08.description: Create role-based middleware: Admin (full access), Manager (CRUD tasks, manage members), Member (view/update own tasks). Apply to all API endpoints. Store roles per project membership.

FR-08.title: Build Role Management UI
FR-08.description: Create team settings page where admins can invite members and assign roles. Role dropdown in member list. Permission denied messages for unauthorized actions.

FR-09.title: Build Integration APIs
FR-09.description: Create GitHub webhook receiver to link commits to tasks. Slack bot for posting task updates. Calendar feed (iCal) for due dates. Generic webhook system: POST /api/webhooks (configure events and URL).

FR-09.title: Build Integrations Settings Page
FR-09.description: Create integrations page with connect/disconnect buttons for GitHub, Slack, Calendar. Webhook management UI to add custom endpoints and select trigger events.

FR-10.title: Build Template API
FR-10.description: Create POST /api/templates (save project as template with tasks/settings). GET /api/templates (list available). POST /api/projects/from-template/:id (create project from template). Include pre-built templates.

FR-10.title: Build Template Selection UI
FR-10.description: Create template gallery with pre-built options (Software Dev, Marketing Campaign, Event Planning) and user-saved templates. Preview showing task structure. Use Template button.
